FACTUAL IMPRECISION: Article states gematik Anteile as 'BMG 51%, GKV-SV 22,05%, PKV 7%, and the remaining 19,95% shared among Bundesärztekammer, KBV, KZBV, BZÄK, DAV, DKG'. The actual structure is: BMG 51%, GKV-SV 22,05%, PKV 7%, and seven Leistungserbringer-Organisationen share 19,95% (ca. 2,85% each). The article is not wrong but the math implies different totals — the description is correct in principle but the parenthetical '(nach dem BMG-Anteil von 51% und dem GKV-Spitzenverband-Anteil von 22,05% sowie dem PKV-Anteil von 7%)' totals 80.05%, leaving 19.95% for all Leistungserbringer. This is accurate.

issues: FACTUAL ERROR: Article states 'rund 73 Millionen Versicherte' (both in definition line and Überblick). The figure '73 Millionen' is outdated. Score -15.
The '88 Prozent der Bevölkerung' figure: with 74.5M GKV / ~84.5M Gesamtbevölkerung this is approximately 88%, so the percentage is still accurate even if the absolute number is outdated.
